headline: 3 Stocks Positioned to Gain From Ongoing Elevation in Crude Price
summary: Rising Middle East tensions push oil near $100 per barrel, boosting the outlook for COP, FANG and EOG as elevated prices are set to persist in 2026.

headline: Goldman Sachs Raises Oil Price Forecasts – Picks 7 Winners Among Energy Stocks
summary: Goldman raised Brent to $100 for Q2 2026 and sees 22% average total return in top E&P names, anchored to a conservative $75/bbl mid-cycle assumption.

headline: Shares of oil-related companies are trading lower after President Trump announced in a Truth Social post the suspension of U.S. strikes on Iranian power generation and energy infrastructure for five days, subject to the outcome of ongoing discussions.
